title: Auto Loan Payment Declined — $412.00 on June 27
description: Your scheduled auto loan payment of $412.00 on June 27 did not go through. The assistant has already identified the cause and a one-tap fix. Tap to see why and resolve it.

confidence.rationale: Declined-transaction record and balance-at-draw are authoritative reads from the Payments Engine and Core Banking. No inference required.

title: Direct Deposit Not Configured — $3,140.00 Held
description: Your employer sent an early salary credit, but direct deposit routing is not set up on your primary checking account, so the funds are not yet applied. This is the root cause of the declined payment.

metrics.condition: early-credit flag, no routing on file

confidence.rationale: Account flags and the employer deposit file are direct reads. The unmatched early-credit / missing-routing condition is a deterministic exception check.

title: Late Fee Window — 3 Days Remaining
description: A $25 late fee applies if the auto loan payment is not completed within the 5-day grace period. You have 3 days remaining. Resolving now avoids the fee.

confidence.rationale: Grace-period terms and elapsed days are authoritative from Loan Servicing. The fee is not yet triggered.
